title: Your 'Free' Rewards Card Is Costing You $2,400
hook: That cashback card isn't rewarding you — it's training you to spend 23% more, and the math is brutal.
angle: Reward programs are psychological conditioning that increases total spending far beyond any cashback earned
audience: Credit card users who think they're 'winning' by earning points and cashback
key_numbers: 23% more spending with rewards cards vs cash
$189 billion in credit card interchange fees in 2023
